prompt:
Analyze the following text and extract ALL temporal information.

For each date or time reference found, provide:
- The date string (in YYYY-MM-DD format when possible)
- A Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch) if the date is specific enough
- A brief context describing what the date refers to

For intervals (e.g. "from 2016 to 2019", "between March and June"), provide:
- start and end timestamps
- context

Also determine the overall time span of the text:
- start_ts: earliest date mentioned (as Unix timestamp)
- end_ts: latest date mentioned (as Unix timestamp)

Text:
"""[10:37 am on 27 June, 2023] Caroline said: "Hey Melanie! Long time no talk! A lot's been going on in my life! Take a look at this."
[10:37 am on 27 June, 2023] Melanie said: "Hey, Caroline! Nice to hear from you! Love the necklace, any special meaning to it?"
[10:37 am on 27 June, 2023] Caroline said: "Thanks, Melanie! This necklace is super special to me - a gift from my grandma in my home country, Sweden. She gave it to me when I was young, and it stands for love, faith and strength. It's like a reminder of my roots and all the love and support I get from my family."
[10:37 am on 27 June, 2023] Melanie said: "That's gorgeous, Caroline! It's awesome what items can mean so much to us, right? Got any other objects that you treasure, like that necklace?"
[10:37 am on 27 June, 2023] Caroline said: "Yep, Melanie! I've got some other stuff with sentimental value, like my hand-painted bowl. A friend made it for my 18th birthday ten years ago. The pattern and colors are awesome-- it reminds me of art and self-expression."
[10:37 am on 27 June, 2023] Melanie said: "That sounds great, Caroline! It's awesome having stuff around that make us think of good connections and times. Actually, I just took my fam camping in the mountains last week - it was a really nice time together!"
[10:37 am on 27 June, 2023] Caroline said: "Sounds great, Mel. Glad you made some new family mems. How was it? Anything fun?"
[10:37 am on 27 June, 2023] Melanie said: "It was an awesome time, Caroline! We explored nature, roasted marshmallows around the campfire and even went on a hike. The view from the top was amazing! The 2 younger kids love nature. It was so special having these moments together as a family - I'll never forget it!"
[10:37 am on 27 June, 2023] Caroline said: "That's awesome, Melanie! Family moments like that are so special. Glad y'all had such a great time."
[10:37 am on 27 June, 2023] Melanie said: "Thanks, Caroline! Family time matters to me. What's up with you lately?"
[10:37 am on 27 June, 2023] Caroline said: "Lately, I've been looking into counseling and mental health as a career. I want to help people who have gone through the same things as me."
[10:37 am on 27 June, 2023] Melanie said: "Sounds great! What kind of counseling and mental health services do you want to persue?"
[10:37 am on 27 June, 2023] Caroline said: "I'm still figuring out the details, but I'm thinking of working with trans people, helping them accept themselves and supporting their mental health. Last Friday, I went to an LGBTQ+ counseling workshop and it was really enlightening. They talked about different therapeutic methods and how to best work with trans people. Seeing how passionate these pros were about making a safe space for people like me was amazing."
[10:37 am on 27 June, 2023] Melanie said: "Woah, Caroline, it sounds like you're doing some impressive work. It's inspiring to see your dedication to helping others. What motivated you to pursue counseling?"
[10:37 am on 27 June, 2023] Caroline said: "Thanks, Melanie. It really mattered. My own journey and the support I got made a huge difference. Now I want to help people go through it too. I saw how counseling and support groups improved my life, so I started caring more about mental health and understanding myself. Now I'm passionate about creating a safe, inviting place for people to grow."
[10:37 am on 27 June, 2023] Melanie said: "Wow, Caroline! You've gained so much from your own experience. Your passion and hard work to help others is awesome. Keep it up, you're making a big impact!"
[10:37 am on 27 June, 2023] Caroline said: "Thanks, Melanie! Your kind words mean a lot."
[10:37 am on 27 June, 2023] Melanie said: "Congrats Caroline! Good on you for going after what you really care about.""""

Return JSON:
```json
{{
    "dates": [
        {{
            "date_str": "YYYY-MM-DD",
            "timestamp": <unix timestamp as float or null>,
            "context": "brief description of what this date refers to"
        }}
    ],
    "intervals": [
        {{
            "start_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
            "end_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
            "start_ts": <unix timestamp as float>,
            "end_ts": <unix timestamp as float>,
            "context": "brief description"
        }}
    ],
    "start_ts": <earliest unix timestamp or null>,
    "end_ts": <latest unix timestamp or null>
}}
```

If no temporal information is found, return empty lists and null timestamps.

JSON Output: /no_think
